product.name: Trailer Tongue Bike Bunk, Adjustable A-Frame Trailer Bike Frame Hold up to 100LBS, RV Bike Rack for Extra Camper Storage Space, Black
features: A-Frame Mounted Design: This camper bike rack can be adjusted from 12''-45'' wide to fit various A-frame of RV, trailer and camper according to the adjustable vertical posts, making it a highly compatible accessory

Safe Bike Carrying: The travel trailer bike rack provides a raised 2” receiver on the A-frame to securely hold your bikes, ensuring safe and easy bike transportation and providing convenience and flexibility
100LBS Carrying Capacity: With its robust design and premium material, the trailer bike rack can support up to 100LBS, providing a secure and stable mounting point for your bike rack during transit
Easy Installation: Direct bolt-on installation with all accessories and instructions included; no drilling required, allowing for quick installation and removal without any additional modifications

Extra Camper Storage Space: The bike bunk is ideal for anyone who wants additional storage space to safely transport bikes; the trailer tongue rack can maximize the space at the A-frame, allowing you to transport and store your bikes and propane tanks
